blended.narrative: Arapahoe Basin is expecting dry conditions over the next 48 hours. The 14-day outlook shows 8 inches total.

daily_summary.narrative: Sunday: 3.8" of snow, highs of 35°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Tuesday: 2.2" of snow, highs of 39°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.

recent_conditions.narrative: 1.6" of new snow in the past 48 hours. Snowpack is building — up 6" over the past week. Current depth: 37".
